## Validate.joinId() function

Joins a base [resource ID](./ts-res.resourceid.md) or [resource name](./ts-res.resourcename.md) with a list of additional names to create a new [resource ID](./ts-res.resourceid.md)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function joinId(base: ResourceName | ResourceId, ...names: ResourceName[]): Result<ResourceId>;
```

**Returns:**

Result&lt;[ResourceId](./ts-res.resourceid.md)<!-- -->&gt;

`Success` with the new ID if the base and names are valid, or `Failure` with an error message if not.
